channel.title: The Lab on Fil Bezerianos - Product & Technology Strategy
channel.description: Recent content in The Lab on Fil Bezerianos - Product & Technology Strategy

item.title: Rethinking How Product Teams Prioritise
item.description: An AI-powered tool that reduces cognitive load in product decision-making. It automatically evaluates new features, calculating their overall impact and priority, saving product teams time and effort.

item.title: What If Property Search Actually Used the Photos?
item.description: Property Visual Finder uses a fine-tuned vision AI model to analyse property photos and identify specific features, enabling advanced, data-driven property ranking, and searches based on visual characteristics.

item.title: Skipping the Part Clients Hate
item.description: An AI-powered tool designed to determine the optimal Cloud migration strategy for applications. It analyses application details and aligns them with the organisation’s Cloud goals to deliver tailored recommendations.

item.title: What Happens When Two AIs Talk to Each Other?
item.description: A personal project where two AI chat agents engage in real-time discussions and debates on various topics. Users can customize the tone, style and LLM model of each agent to make things even more engaging.

item.title: The Diagram That Takes Three Days to Draw
item.description: A tool that leverages AI to transform unstructured interview data into a visual overview diagram, expediting the analysis of structures and processes and enabling the identification of inefficiencies.

item.title: An AI With One Job, Make You Smile
item.description: PunGPT is personal project built for fun and powered by a lightweight LLaMA model, it delivers puns and dad jokes on demand, and sometimes when you least expect them. All wrapped in a clean, familiar chat UI.
